title: Hornet Removal in Park Slope, Brooklyn | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Park Slope, Brooklyn. Licensed exterminators serving brownstones & homes near Prospect Park. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Park Slope residents facing hornet infestations need fast, professional removal to protect their families and properties. Our experienced technicians provide safe, effective hornet nest removal throughout Park Slope, from classic brownstones along tree-lined streets to modern condos near Prospect Park. With pricing between $350-$550, we deliver thorough hornet elimination with guaranteed results.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Park Slope for years, understanding the unique pest challenges of this historic Brooklyn neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly methods safe for families, pets, and the beautiful trees that make Park Slope special, with same-day emergency service available.
localContext: Park Slope's mature trees along streets like Prospect Park West and 7th Avenue, plus the proximity to Prospect Park itself, create ideal nesting conditions for hornets in eaves, attics, and gardens. The neighborhood's mix of historic brownstones and multi-family buildings requires experienced professionals who understand how to safely access and treat nests in century-old structures.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Park Slope?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal in Park Slope typically costs between $350-$550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground-level nests are less expensive, while second or third-floor brownstone treatments may be at the higher end due to equipment and safety requirements.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Park Slope?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day hornet removal service throughout Park Slope. Once you call, we typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency situations. Treatment itself takes 1-2 hours, and we ensure complete nest elimination before leaving your property.

faqs.question: Are hornets common near Prospect Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets are particularly common in Park Slope due to proximity to Prospect Park and the neighborhood's abundant mature trees. They often build nests in brownstone eaves, attic spaces, garden sheds, and tree branches, especially during late spring through fall.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my Park Slope brownstone?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our technicians are trained in treating historic Brooklyn brownstones and use methods that protect your property's integrity. We avoid damaging original woodwork, masonry, or architectural details while completely eliminating the hornet threat.
